title: rhynchosia swartzii
intro: Rhynchosia swartzii, also known as the Swartz's Rattle Box or Butterfly Pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Rhynchosia swartzii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Caribbean and other parts of the world.
